items.title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
items.summary: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

items.title: Ugandan opposition leader tells BBC he fled abroad fearing for his life
items.summary: He says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."

items.title: Sweden detains captain of Russian shadow fleet ship
items.summary: The skipper of the Sea Owl One is suspected of producing forged documents when it was boarded by coast guard.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 高市訪美在即 美日可望深化第一島鏈安全承諾
items.summary: 日本首相高市早苗本週將訪問美國，預定19日與美國總統川普舉行峰會。國防安全研究院所長蘇紫雲表示，此行時機點正好在川普與習近平可能會晤之前，顯示華府對東亞安全的優先關...…

items.title: 台日安全合作 蘇紫雲：台灣越強 朋友願意相挺
items.summary: 國防安全研究院所長蘇紫雲表示，外界常提到中國可能在2027年前後具備攻台能力，但所謂「時間窗口」並非固定，關鍵取決於台灣自身防衛能力，只要實力持續提升，這個時間點可...…

items.title: 伊朗媒體：勞工部長宣布最低工資將調漲逾6成
items.summary: 當地媒體今天報導，伊朗勞工部長宣布，最低工資將調漲逾60%。惡劣經濟情勢於數個月前在當地引爆一波反政府抗爭。  法新社報導，伊朗每年都會根據通膨情況調整最低工資。在美國、以色列與伊朗進行中的...…
